windows.embed_text_v2: Dripping rainbow colored dye down inside clear glass candle, blue yellow red magenta streaks bleeding through white wax, wooden craft stick centering wick, metal base, drip-effect candle making
windows.summary_v2: Rainbow dye is dripped down the inside of a clear glass wax candle, bleeding colorful streaks through the white wax while a wooden stick centers the wick.

tags_v2.setting: white sheet surface with metal candle base

seconds_v2.desc: A clear glass cylinder candle sits on a metal base over a white sheet; a wooden craft stick lies across the rim holding the centered wick, white wax inside with a band of blue dye and rainbow color drips running down the inner glass wall.
Same setup, colored dye continues bleeding down the inside of the glass; blue, yellow and red streaks streak the white wax beneath a central pool of color.
The rainbow drips lengthen down the inner wall toward the base; the wooden stick still spans the top, suspending the wick over the white wax.
More vivid yellow and red streaks bleed downward through the white wax; the blue band remains across the upper portion of the glass.
Color drips reach further down the cylinder, blue, yellow, red and magenta lines pattern the white wax around the centered wick on its wooden support.
Drips spread and intensify, the white wax body now striped with multiple rainbow colors running from a colored crown at the top.
Colors continue dispersing down the wax; an orange dot of dye appears mid-glass as the multicolor drip pattern develops.
The drip-effect candle is now densely striped with rainbow color down its white wax interior, wick still held by the wooden stick across the rim.
Final frame shows the finished rainbow drip pattern fully run down the white wax inside the glass, wooden stick and wick centered on the metal base.

windows.embed_text_v2: Positioning stainless steel pouring pitcher of melted paraffin wax over parchment-lined rectangular mould, preparing to pour blue-tinted wax, dye chips on stained cutting board, candle making setup
windows.summary_v2: A hand positions a stainless steel pouring pitcher of melted paraffin wax beside a parchment-lined rectangular mould, preparing to pour colored wax.

tags_v2.setting: white sheet workspace with stained cutting board

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a parchment-lined rectangular mould on a white sheet; to the right a white cutting board stained pink holds a metal pouring pitcher's dark base, prepping to pour wax.
A hand brings the dark-bottomed metal pouring jug onto the stained white board beside the empty parchment-lined tray; a multicolor dye palette sits at the right edge.
Angle shifts lower; the stainless steel pouring pitcher, held by its handle, is set on the pink-stained cutting board next to the white parchment-lined mould.
The metal jug of melted wax rests on the board, hand on the handle, positioned over the lined tray ready to pour the colored paraffin.
Same framing, the pouring pitcher steady on the stained board beside the empty parchment-lined rectangular mould, colored dye chips visible at frame edge.
The steel pitcher remains poised on the cutting board; the parchment-lined tray waits empty to the left for the wax pour.
Hand keeps the metal pouring jug positioned near the lined mould; pink and yellow dye stains streak the white board.
Continued shot of the pouring pitcher held over the stained board beside the empty parchment-lined tray, awaiting the colored wax pour.
Final frame: stainless pouring jug steady on the pink-stained cutting board next to the white parchment-lined rectangular mould, set up to pour blue-tinted paraffin wax.
